title: Tomato Tag
description: This mod adds a throwable tomato item and a bow that shoots the tomatoes! It can be played with the available custom Tomato Arena map to have the ultimate game of tag.
body:
This mod adds a throwable tomato item and a bow that shoots the tomatoes! It can be played with the available custom Tomato Arena map to have the ultimate game of tag. Download the complementary map with this link: 
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1aM16GM_3JeYoriMfAYaiP3JxFP1WOK-n/view?usp=sharing

How to add a downloaded map to minecraft (1.21):

https://youtu.be/eL4GY6oMB8w?feature=shared&t=181

To Play Tag:

Download and load the mod up first, then download the map! The arena should be preset with chests of tomatoes and tomabows!

Get a friend or even a group, set your spawns in the arena's beds, empty your inventories, enter survival mode, and PLAY! The tomatoes will light up your friends so its harder for them to hide. Beat the in map parkour or find hidden chests to access the infamous Tomabow!

Spell out TOMATO one letter at a time in the chat every time you die. The first person to spell the whole word loses! In other words, you get 6 lives. Once you've finished, feel free to reset the map and chests however you see fit.



Most importantly, enjoy playing.
